name: engram-rust1b

scripts.build:worker: bun x tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/build-ts.ts && node scripts/build-engine.ts && node scripts/build-codec.ts && node scripts/engine-hash.ts && worker-build --release

//: ws is a devDependency (live-test client only). worker-build 0.8.3 merges a top-level `dependencies` block into the wasm-bindgen snippet package.json and mis-parses it (see apps/kernel/package.json + docs/results/v0.md) — so NEVER put a `dependencies` key here.
